title: clinopodium tenellum
intro: Clinopodium tenellum, also known as dwarf calamintha or tiny calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a carminative and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Clinopodium tenellum include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Clinopodium tenellum is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
